canvas.notes: All generated HTML/CSS designs must render at a 4:5 aspect ratio. Use the reference dimensions (1080x1350) as the default export size; scale proportionally for other resolutions.

cream.description: Primary background. Warm off-white cream. Use as the default page/canvas fill.
usage: Text color when placed on black or lavender blocks
doNotUse: Do not use for body text on light backgrounds (insufficient contrast)

lavender.description: Primary brand accent. Soft lavender. Use for hero shapes, highlight blocks, and brand elements.
usage: Section backgrounds that need visual emphasis
doNotUse: Do not use for small body text on cream (low contrast)
Avoid pairing directly with lime as dominant duo without a neutral separator

black.description: Primary text and high-contrast anchor. Use for headlines, body copy, outlines, and icons.
usage: Headlines and body text on cream or lavender
doNotUse: Avoid large full-black backgrounds unless paired with cream or lime text

lime.description: Secondary accent. Electric lime. Use sparingly for highlights, CTAs, and attention-grabbing marks.
doNotUse: Do not use as a dominant background for long-form text
Do not place lime text on cream (insufficient contrast)

usageRatio.notes: Approximate visual weight per design. Background dominates; accent (lime) should feel rare and intentional.

allowed.use: Lime accents on lavender (decorative only, not body text)

cssVariables.--font-h2: 'Times New Roman MT Condensed', 'Times New Roman', serif

h1.description: Primary display headline. Classical, literary serif. Use for the biggest statement on the canvas.

h2.description: Secondary headline in condensed Times. Set in normal style, but italicize key words for emphasis and editorial rhythm.

emphasis.rule: Within any H2, italicize 1–3 key words that carry the core meaning. The rest remains upright. Do not italicize the entire line.

h2.cssStack: 'Times New Roman MT Condensed', 'Times New Roman', serif

h3.description: Tertiary heading. Matches H1 family to reinforce the serif voice at smaller scale.

body.description: Body copy. Geometric sans-serif for clarity and contrast against the serif headings.

pairingNotes: Serif (Junicode / Times NR Condensed) for headings, sans (Chivo) for body — never mix the roles.
H2 italic-emphasis is a signature move: always italicize the semantically loaded word(s), not decorative ones.
Keep body text in black (#000000) on cream (#FFF9E9) or cream on black for maximum legibility.
